steps.title: Use a weighted mean
steps.content: The two penguin groups have different sizes, so do not average $84$ and $90$ directly. Weight each mean by the number of penguins in that group.

steps.title: Calculate the total height sum
steps.content: The South Georgia group contributes $$420\cdot84=35{,}280.$$ The Macquarie Island group contributes $$210\cdot90=18{,}900.$$ The combined total is $$35{,}280+18{,}900=54{,}180.$$

steps.title: Divide by the total number of penguins
steps.content: There are $$420+210=630$$ penguins total, so the overall mean is $$\frac{54{,}180}{630}=86.$$
